ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Close Of Estate
Off Calendar Jan-08-2024 Off Calendar

ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: Accounting #1, Report, Fees, Final Distribution
Off Calendar Sep-20-2023 Granted Per Written Order

PETITION FOR LETTERS OF ADMINISTRATION
Off Calendar Dec-23-2022 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Lee Kaster, via Zoom, for Lillian Chou, Petitioner.

At the query of the court, counsel confirms that the previous attorney handling this matter was Albert Lee and that he represents the Petitioner in this matter in the related Santa Clara County Estate matter. The court queries regarding the status of the Estate's triplex specifically as to the title. Counsel reports that the real property is solely owned by See Dock Fan and was never community property and that the plan is to keep the property. The court confirms with counsel that he believes that expenses related to the real property have been paid by the family. The court advises counsel of the expectation that the Estates are closed in one year if the court grants the instant petitions. Counsel acknowledges the court's expectations and advises that he expects to obtain a waiver of accounting from Stephen who appears to have a good relationship with his client.

The subject matter is taken under submission.

Judge: Hon. Joseph Quinn. Clerk: Robert Woods. Deputy: Choi. Not Reported.

PETITION FOR LETTERS OF ADMINISTRATION
Off Calendar Nov-22-2022 Continued To Dec-20-22 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
